title: Beauty Trainer
description:
Job Responsibilities

· Develop, design instructional courses and curriculum as required

· Conduct training on various courses including that for beauty treatment technique; theoretical and practical

· Conduct beauty product knowledge training and treatment protocol

· Develop in-house skills assessment checklist; evaluating the clients, beauticians/ therapists, as and if required

· Collaborating with marketing and related teams (to organise and conduct promotional and marketing activities such as beauty workshops, seminars and product launches etc

· To furnish the company with the latest beauty industry information; eg competitors’ activities and beauty care trends, treatment, products etc.

· Work closely with management team on training needs.

· Other ad-hoc tasks/projects assigned


Job Requirements

· Min 2 years of beauty training and facilitation skills & experiences

· Must possess a professional certification in Beauty & Spa; preferably CIDESCO, CIBTAC or ITEC and WSQ Advanced Certificate in Training and Assessment (ACTA)

· Proficient in English and Chinese to communicate well with clients

· To work independently and as a good team player with a positive attitude and pleasant disposition

· Proactive and able to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines

· Able to take on training assignments including on weekends and in the evenings


Please WhatsApp your resume to 90700919 or email to: human.resources@gimanbeauty.com

postedCompany.description:
Modern Beauty Salon Singapore (the "Company") and its subsidiaries (the "Group" or "Modern Beauty") is a leader of the beauty industry in Hong Kong offering professional treatments as well as quality services and products with scientifically-proven and natural ingredients. Modern Beauty Salon Singapore is a fast growing one-stop beauty center. To meet the ever-increasing beauty demands in Singapore, Modern Beauty Salons provides the most comprehensive selections and high quality beauty care services to our loyal customers. We believe that no matter which age group you belong to or what body figure you have, you do need us! Life is all about enjoyment and satisfaction. And sure enough, that’s what exactly our guaranteed first-class service can provide you!

 

Modern Beauty Salon is founded on the principle - and with the aim, of providing a one-stop wellness centre that is able to embrace the modern individual's hectic lifestyle preferences. In this way, we set ourselves apart from our traditional competition and create a complete wellness experience that has left many, absolutely delighted.

We will continue to expand wherever the opportunity arises, throughout the Asia Pacific region. With it, we will help many achieve their personal goals of being beautiful, confident individuals, today.
postedCompany.name: MODERN BEAUTY SALON (S) PTE. LTD.
